name: coral
description: Karpathy-style LLM wiki + multi-repo manifest + MCP server for git repos. Lets Claude Desktop read your repo's wiki, manifest, lockfile, and test results via Model Context Protocol.
long_description: Coral is a single Rust binary that scaffolds and maintains an LLM-curated wiki for one or many git repos, declares them in a coral.toml manifest, brings up dev environments via docker compose, runs functional tests, and exposes everything to MCP-speaking agents. This bundle ships the precompiled binary and registers it as a stdio MCP server with Claude Desktop. See https://github.com/agustincbajo/Coral for full docs.
